positive: A vibrant, symmetrical mandalic composition featuring stylized mythical forest fauna, geometric floral elements, and delicate glowing flora. The style is neo-tribal art combined with Art Nouveau influences, rendered with deep contrast and clean, solid silhouettes. Focus on detailed linework, rich color gradients (sapphire blue, emerald green, and burnt orange accents), and a highly ornamental, repeating pattern structure suitable for fabric printing. Central composition with strong visual flow, high detail, graphic novel quality.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, poor quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, low detail, amateur, logo, trademark, copyright, messy
